validation_results.description: Fix for accessibility: Form input missing label
validation_results.content_preview:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Accessibility Fix</title>
</head>
<body>
    <form action="#" method="get">
        <label for="no-id">Search:</label>
        <input type="search" id="no-id" name="search-query" placeholder="Enter search term">
        <button type="submit">Search</button>
    </form>
</body>
</html>
